body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318334918D0987D1B44CF480548"}"},"total":347},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611823678784078617","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好！情节跌宕起伏！经典！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772268041,"group_id":"7528383961316199449","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3aGaMse/nWaqzKujgl93Xj/I7mUZMCCO9BwfK/5Rzx7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"2049093821275560","user_name":"开阳大陆的河安家族"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2049093821275560","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7528383961316199449","book_info":{"abstract":"前世北大历史系翘楚林砚秋，一朝穿成大景王朝三试不第的穷书生，与已故县令千金的婚约沦为全村笑柄。
科考前夕，崔家主母亲临破屋，非但不退婚，反而执意履约。
后，他一路势如破竹，连中六元，金殿之上被天子钦点为状元。
一曲《水调歌头》引得江南十大花魁自荐枕席；
一场酒宴，兴至酣处，《将进酒》磅礴而出，从此诗坛无人敢称豪迈；
话本《倩女幽魂》，更是让无数书生笃信荒郊古刹必有奇遇，客栈生意一落千丈。
科举文章被奉为范本，注解经义直入官学。
但这仅是开始。
三十岁生辰那天，他立于朝堂之巅，官拜宰相，门生故吏遍布。
一句“为天地立心，为生民立命，为往圣继绝学，为万世开太平”，重塑天下文人风骨，被天下士子奉为文圣。
改良农具、兴修水利，让百姓仓廪丰实；
组建新军，造神机火炮，北驱鞑虏，南平倭寇，开辟海上商路，缔造“大景银元”通行四海。
庙堂之上，他渐成无冕之君。
那日，一只麋鹿被牵入庄严大殿，众臣愕然。
只见宰相林砚秋手指其鹿，目光扫过满朝朱紫，含笑问道：“诸位且看，此马如何？”
顷刻间，殿内死寂。
旋即，文武百官竟齐齐躬身： “丞相明鉴，此乃千里马！”
龙椅上的皇帝，亦只能颔首附和。
林砚秋盯着龙椅，若有所思......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ce2cb35c2eaf53700a9ec8461e4e47a6","author":"啊珍爱上了阿强","author_id":"","book_id":"7528383961316199449","book_name":"北大硕士科举：震惊满朝文武","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529404022436921881","read_count":"95690","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"511698"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"245","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,开局,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e46d127608b4255ae240ebc048133843~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446029&x-signature=ECW9jWs5gMkCDHYg31hV7GDTmOA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4190956418514279","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"115"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318334918D0987D1B44CF480548"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_ 三十岁生辰那天，他立于朝堂之巅，官拜宰相，门生故吏遍布。
一句“为天地立心，为生民立命，为往圣继绝学，为万世开太平”，重塑天下文人风骨，被天下士子奉为文圣。

那日，一只麋鹿被牵入庄严大殿，众臣愕然。
只见宰相林砚秋手指其鹿，目光扫过满朝朱紫，含笑问道：“诸位且看，此马如何？”
顷刻间，殿内死寂。
旋即，文武百官竟齐齐躬身： “丞相明鉴，此乃千里马！”
